settings.run_label: M3-lite Visual Index Card Smoke Eval
settings.ingest_path_note: real AnythingLLM upload API and collector; image files go through OCR plus local VLM visual search index card enrichment with local cache.

workspace.name: M3-lite Visual Index Card Smoke
workspace.openAiPrompt: Given the following conversation, relevant context, and a follow up question, reply with an answer to the current question the user is asking. Return only your response to the question given the above information following the users instructions as needed.

query_rows.query: Find the image of a black cat sitting in a bathroom sink.
Find the close-up photo of a black cat in green grass.
Find the photo with a camera placed next to a smartphone on a table.

document.title: coco_110449
document.pageContent:
# WICI Visual Search Index Card
SEARCH_SUMMARY: Two individuals are engaged in an activity involving gaming controllers and a surface.

VISIBLE_TEXT: NOBODY'S PERFECT

OBJECTS: gaming controller, wristband, cap, t-shirt, table

SCENE: indoor setting with plain walls and minimal background details.

COLORS_AND_ATTRIBUTES: white (controller), green (t-shirt), black (cap), white text on shirt, brown hair, light skin tone.

RELATIONSHIPS: one person is holding a gaming controller while the other has their hands extended towards a surface. Both are focused on something off-camera.

DOCUMENT_TYPE: photo

SEARCH_PHRASES: gaming setup, friends playing games, casual gaming session
